decision_reason: The forecast shows a timing-related cash gap. Review cash timing and funding options before increasing spend.

scale.reason: Scaling should wait until cash timing and economics are clearly safe.

hold.reason: Holding spend can give payout timing, refunds, and inventory pressure time to catch up.

fix.reason: Margin, refund drag, ROAS, and inventory timing should be checked before pushing spend.

funding_review.reason: Funding should only be reviewed when the underlying unit economics are sound and repayment risk is understood.
